arts.ttl: Confirmed: Real Madrid’s stance on signing Man City star Rodri
arts.sum: An insight into the stance of the powers that be at La Liga giants Real Madrid when it comes to the potental signing of Manchester City star Rodri has this…

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot fires title warning to Man City ahead of huge Premier League clash
arts.sum: Liverpool are five points clear at the top of the Premier League going into this weekend's matches, with Manchester City sitting nine five points adrift.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes Tottenham transfer claim and drops Richarlison and Wilson Odobert hint
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has indicated that Tottenham's January plans may depend on the status of his squad come the turn of the year. "Obviously Wilson will be out for a fair chunk of the season, Richy hopefully will be back in the new year but similar to Micky we just need to be careful every step of the way and Mikey will still be out for a little bit of time.

arts.ttl: What Pep Guardiola has told Man City squad about his future beyond two-year contract
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola hints at staying beyond 2027 as he tells Manchester City players his new two-year contract extension might be just the start

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski fires a shot at his Tottenham team-mates as he warns them that Ange Postecoglou's team 'lack a little bit of discipline' to become a champion
arts.sum: Tottenham midfielder Dejan Kulusevski has fired shots at his teammates as he revealed where it is all going wrong for Ange Postecoglou's men.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou defends Spurs appeal over Bentancur ban
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou says he is not interested in how the decision to appeal against Rodrigo Bentancur's seven-game domestic ban for a racist slur looks to the outside world.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits Man City exit could be months away despite signing new deal
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola agreed a new two-year deal with Manchester City to end speculation over his future - but the Spaniard has admitted the situation could change again if results do not improve after four straight defeats

arts.ttl: Harry Kane smashes Erling Haaland Bundesliga goalscoring record
arts.sum: Harry Kane takes just 43 games to bring up 50 Bundeslig goals for Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: ‘I don’t like it’: Troy Deeney has now predicted who will win – Tottenham or Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City face Tottenham this weekend in a game that is a borderline must win for both teams. Tottenham come into this game sitting 10th...

arts.ttl: Guardiola staying at Man City is good news for Premier League - Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot praises Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola after hesigned a new two-year deal with the Premier League champions that will run until 2027.
